seoTitle: Ascot Vale vs Ashburton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ascot Vale and Ashburton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ascot Vale vs Ashburton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ascot Vale and Ashburton.
heading: Ascot Vale vs Ashburton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ascot Vale, Victoria and Ashburton, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ashburton has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Ascot Vale (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ascot Vale or Ashburton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ascot Vale has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Ashburton scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ascot Vale scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Ashburton scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ascot Vale or Ashburton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ashburton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
